name: omarchy_web_apps
content:
Web Apps 
You can add your own web apps using Insta > Web App in the Omarchy menu (Super +
Alt + Space). It' ask you for the app name, app URL, and then the icon URL. You can get
great PNG icons for many popuar web apps on Dashboard Icons.
They' then be accessibe through the app auncher (Super + Space ), and use the
beautifu frameess web-app window.
If you wish to remove a web app, just go to Remove > Web App in the Omarchy menu.
It's best if you og into a your accounts using a reguar browser before using the web app
shortcuts. The thin wrapper frame doesn't work we with 1password, so just easier to be
ogged in directy first.
A the keyboard hotkeys for these web apps can be changed in ~/.config/hypr/
bindings.conf.
When you're in a web app, you can copy the current URL to the cipboard using Shift +
Alt + L.
By defaut, Omarchy aready ships with an assortment of defaut apps:
HEY 
HEY is an emai and caendar service that serves as a great aternative to peope tired of
Gmai, Outook, or Appe Mai. It's made by 37signas where Omarchy originated.
You can start HEY Emai using Super + Shift + E and HEY Caendar using Super +
Shift + C.
Basecamp 
Basecamp is a project management service that heps sma teams move faster and make
more progress. Instead of patching together a mishmash of Treo, Sack, Asana, Notion,
or whatever, you can have it a in one pace with Basecamp. It's made by 37signas where
Omarchy originated.
You can start Basecamp using the appication auncher (Super + Space )
ChatGPT 
ChatGPT is the most popuar AI chat bot in the word.
You can start ChatGPT using Super + Shift + A.
WhatsApp

---

WhatsApp is one of the most popuar messaging services in the word, and the web
version is a great option for Linux.
You can start WhatsApp using Super + Ctrl + G.
X 
X is where news break.
You can start X using Super + Shift + X and go straight to writing a new post with Super
+ Shift + Alt + X.
YouTube 
YouTube is the most video patform in the word.
You can start YouTube using Super + Shift + Y.
Zoom 
Zoom is the most popuar video chat system used in the US. Great connections across the
word. And 40-minute meetings can be hed without a paying account.
You start Zoom using the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
